textByHash.3a1d6ebea1411934b9ba6bb6d80c22909d7fc7d6: Yes, very fun! I haven't had such an adventure in years!
textByHash.3ddc97923bbe743450163ca412aee3f6efbbf570: Sorry, dearie, if I stop to chat I'll lose count. Talk to my sister instead; she likes to chat. You'll find her upstairs in the church.
textByHash.ed6a91acfe82eb759abd551810ae13028c098af7: Me, forget? Never! I still hear the ringing in my head when I go to sleep sometimes!
textByHash.6527f37f75f82116b94a990f0406a43bc5704b03: Yes, it was surprisingly loud doing that.
textByHash.abf5000d887230f16da5e9226243c9929e379fb7: Hello dearie, of course I remember it!
textByHash.d33fd417d17ad957876652a46899e651b9d1303a: I dream about it sometimes, especially sneaking into the Blue Moon Inn kitchens for the rolling pin and saucepan!
textByHash.ab5b8787ddb455f46a1a3cb2e11340e45c772f56: Although probably best I don't do that again, I still feel bad for the chef.
textByHash.e8fc6dc0aa4313b24a07efdc09ed1aea2665e535: I don't only remember it, I remember it fondly, I loved it!
textByHash.495b4cce999df20c17751b8dd4e0e76b662c8dcf: Yes, very. I'm so happy that you picked me to help you.
textByHash.61093519ad7183f5bf6cedfa4f18520396d166a2: Of course dearie! How could I ever forget it? I had such a great time.
textByHash.d7fce36a7906668ee02ff555bd653a258e99a320: Well keep it up, don't let an old lady like me distract you. I've had my fill of adventure now!
textByHash.0879d032824858c56298cb45c7e66a16fcba060d: There is no way I could forget it. Thank you for letting me come on such an adventure!
textByHash.e518bbcbd71e43a438cfba9a9d36fbb0da7f120f: That would be lovely dearie, but maybe we go on one that doesn't involve climbing trees?
textByHash.e9392d4dac904b702c52bea211ffa57619f6ea93: I'm getting a bit old for that!
textByHash.85c1a286d952b8fab74bdac25c332a2c42a83803: How could I not? It was amazing! I see you're still wearing that jumper I knitted you.
textByHash.4896d58cca5be29ffbb786707a3b908df59c8eba: That is good to hear. Do you have a favourite way to wear it?
textByHash.61f7ec902cb8c733d1523485f371556c6079b57a: I like it too! It reminds me of pumpkins and spooky things, just like our adventure!
textByHash.c3875866c1e9f9e94b5dcd11a9ed8f377e9dae31: I like it too! It's pretty scary looking, just like how we saw Death in our adventure!
textByHash.8220b5092aa518d7009293e35217ddc74c920b01: Sorry, dearie, if I stop to chat I'll lose count.
